name: Classical Wrought Iron
description: Hand-forged wrought iron gate with ornate scrollwork, arched top, and ring motifs. Traditional craftsmanship.

name: Contemporary Jali
description: CNC laser-cut geometric flower-of-life pattern in brass on white frame. Modern luxury.

name: Modern Slatted
description: Dark wood horizontal slats with stainless steel frame and bar handles. Clean, contemporary.

name: Wood Plank with Studs
description: Horizontal wood planks with brass pyramid studs on steel frame. Bold and solid.

name: Wood & Brass Jali
description: Dark wood vertical planks with illuminated brass jali panel. Statement entrance.

name: Laser-Cut Geometric
description: Large-format CNC laser-cut geometric pattern in brass with ambient backlighting at dusk.

name: Wood & Iron Scrollwork
description: Wood plank gate with wrought iron scrollwork bands. Heritage meets warmth.

name: Flower of Life Gate
description: Brass flower-of-life pattern on white panels with dark granite pillars. Premium CNC work.

name: CNC Jali Screen Gate
description: Three-panel CNC-cut geometric jali in black steel. Allows light while maintaining privacy.

name: Heritage Iron & Wood
description: Vertical wood panels with ornate wrought iron top and bottom bands. Fleur-de-lis details.

name: Victorian Scrollwork
description: Forged iron scrollwork crown with wood panel inserts. Deep patina finish.

name: Rosewood & Iron
description: Rich rosewood vertical planks flanked by wrought iron scrollwork side panels.
